label: Balanced v2 — fix the understeer, protect the pace
rationale: Current setup (rear_wing=0) is a leaderboard trick that works but leaves the car on a knife-edge. These changes tighten the handling window while recovering most of the lap time through better corner entry — aim is sub-1:29.0.

changes.why: ARB=8 (max) worsens front lock-up under braking — dropping to 6 gives the tyre more compliance without losing stiffness for fast corners
Rear locking at C4 + front locking at C1 both point to bias slightly rearward; 49 balances both axles better
Adds a small amount of rear stability to fix the lap-wide understeer; costs ~0.05–0.1s on straights but recovers it in C1/C2 rotation
100% fully locked diff causes rear snap on throttle in medium-speed corners — 80% gives cleaner exits without losing traction drive
